title: Statistics
seoTitle: Game of Darts Statistics | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand how Game of Darts tracks player statistics, session history, and performance trends.
summary: Your match results are saved by game mode and player to help you track improvement over time.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts statistics image

sections.heading: Track Your Progress
paragraphs: Game of Darts records detailed statistics to help you understand your performance and improve over time. Every completed match contributes towards your personal history, allowing you to monitor progress across multiple game modes.
Statistics are available for supported games and can be viewed from the Player screen, giving you a clear picture of your strengths and areas for improvement.

sections.heading: Match Statistics
paragraphs: After every completed match you can review performance information for the players involved. The statistics shown depend on the selected game mode, but are designed to highlight both scoring and consistency.

sections.heading: Player History
paragraphs: Statistics are stored for each player, allowing long-term progress to be tracked across multiple sessions. Historical results make it easy to compare current performance with previous games and identify improvements over time.
Player statistics are available from the Player screen by selecting a player and then choosing the game mode you want to review.

sections.heading: Advanced Statistics
paragraphs: Advanced Statistics provide a deeper analysis of your performance with additional charts, trends and historical information. Access is unlocked by meeting the gameplay requirements or through premium access.
These additional insights are ideal for players looking to analyse their game in greater detail and monitor long-term improvements.

sections.heading: Improve Your Game
paragraphs: Reviewing your statistics regularly can help identify patterns in your play. Improving averages, increasing checkout percentages and reducing missed doubles are all excellent indicators that your game is progressing.
Combine your statistics with regular practice against DartBot or friends to steadily improve your overall performance.

images.alt: Artwork for Game of Darts statistics
images.caption: Statistics screenshot

featureShowcases.heading: Review performance after play
featureShowcases.summary: Statistics turn completed matches into a record players can use to understand scoring, consistency, and improvement over time.
body: This matters because darts improvement is often gradual. Seeing averages, checkouts, high scores, and game-specific results helps players spot what is improving and what needs more practice.
Players use statistics after a session or across multiple sessions to compare performance by player and game mode.
bullets: Tracks results by player and supported game mode.
Supports match averages, high scores, checkouts, and game-specific measures where available.
Helps players choose what to practise next.

image.caption: Statistics artwork is used as the current placeholder for player performance review.

featureShowcases.heading: Build a longer-term player history
featureShowcases.summary: Statistics are most useful when players can return to them over time and compare current sessions against previous results.
body: This matters because a single match can be noisy. Longer-term player history makes it easier to see whether practice against friends, solo sessions, or DartBot matches are improving real performance.
Players use historical stats to compare time periods, review supported game modes, and decide whether to change practice focus.
bullets: Supports progress review beyond one match.
Works alongside Game Center goals and achievements.
Pairs naturally with DartBot practice and match-type variety.

image.alt: Game of Darts setup screen leading into player statistics
image.caption: The main setup screenshot is reused as the current placeholder for the route from play into saved results.
